title: Exercise Progression to Incrementally Load the Achilles Tendon.
authors: Baxter JR|Corrigan P|Hullfish TJ|O'Rourke P|Silbernagel KG
journal: Medicine and Science in Sports and Exercise
exactExercise: Seated heel raise|Bilateral heel raise|Single-leg heel raise|Single-leg forward hop|Single-leg lateral hop|Lunge
exerciseProtocol: Progressive heel-raise, hopping, and lunge tasks
measurementMethod: 3D motion analysis, ground reaction force, and constrained free-body Achilles model
